title: Best storage containers | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best storage containers. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Rubbermaid Brilliance Plastic Food Storage Containers (various set sizes)
cons: Plastic can stain or retain odors for some users
Some reports of gasket/mold issues over long term

recommendations.product_name: OXO Good Grips POP Container Set (pantry storage)
pros: Clear walls for easy content ID
cons: Primarily for dry goods (not all sizes are meal-storage friendly)
Button mechanism can collect crumbs over time

recommendations.product_name: Pyrex Simply Store / Pyrex Glass Food Storage Sets
pros: Tempered glass — oven, microwave, freezer safe; resists stains/odors
Durable lids and wide size range for meal prep
cons: Heavier than plastic; nested glass can stick
Lids may not be as airtight as some plastic specialty seals
